caribbean.headline: Bimini Rain with Light Winds and Short Swells
caribbean.paragraph: Bimini (Bahamas) is experiencing southerly swells with winds of 17 kt, seas near 2.4 ft and a 6 s swell period, with a 100% rain probability. I note nearby Freeport reporting 16 kt winds, and I advise mariners to prepare for reduced visibility in heavy rain and brief uncomfortable conditions for small craft despite seas remaining modest.

mediterranean.headline: Gusty NNE Swell Affects Mykonos; Seas Up to 5.4 ft
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing a NNE-dominant swell with winds up to 23 kt, significant wave heights near 5.4 ft and a 6 s swell period, and 25% rain probability. I recommend operators and leisure craft exercise caution in Mykonos harbor and nearby approaches, and note Dubrovnik is seeing lighter 18 kt winds with lower seas.
